'''竏單-th-s''' ('''kadathas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ssk|ssk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ssk|ssk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單-th-s
|-
! Lemma
| kadathas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidathas|thidathas]] || [[word:jidathas|jidathas]] || [[word:shidathas|shidathas]] || [[word:kidathas|kidathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudathas|thuthudathas]] || [[word:jujudathas|jujudathas]] || [[word:shushudathas|shushudathas]] || [[word:kukudathas|kukudathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudathas|thudathas]] || [[word:judathas|judathas]] || [[word:shudathas|shudathas]] || [[word:kudathas|kudathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudathas|thudathas]] || [[word:judathas|judathas]] || [[word:shudathas|shudathas]] || [[word:kudathas|kudathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedathas|thedathas]] || [[word:jedathas|jedathas]] || [[word:shedathas|shedathas]] || [[word:kedathas|kedathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodathas|thothodathas]] || [[word:jojodathas|jojodathas]] || [[word:shoshodathas|shoshodathas]] || [[word:kokodathas|kokodathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodathas|thodathas]] || [[word:jodathas|jodathas]] || [[word:shodathas|shodathas]] || [[word:kodathas|kodathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodathas|thodathas]] || [[word:jodathas|jodathas]] || [[word:shodathas|shodathas]] || [[word:kodathas|kodathas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]] || [[word:dathas|dathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦdathas|thﾃｦdathas]] || [[word:jﾃｦdathas|jﾃｦdathas]] || [[word:shﾃｦdathas|shﾃｦdathas]] || [[word:kﾃｦdathas|kﾃｦdathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadathas|thathadathas]] || [[word:jajadathas|jajadathas]] || [[word:shashadathas|shashadathas]] || [[word:kakadathas|kakadathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadathas|thadathas]] || [[word:jadathas|jadathas]] || [[word:shadathas|shadathas]] || [[word:kadathas|kadathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadathas|thadathas]] || [[word:jadathas|jadathas]] || [[word:shadathas|shadathas]] || [[word:kadathas|kadathas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadathas|shadathas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadathas|goshadathas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadathas|gokishadathas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadathasnﾃｼ|shadathasnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadathasnknﾃｼ|goshadathasnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathasnﾃｼ|gokishadathasnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadathasshﾃｫ|shadathasshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadathasnkshﾃｫ|goshadathasnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadathasshﾃｫ|gokishadathasshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathasro|shadathasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathasnkro|goshadathasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathasro|gokishadathasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathasmu|shadathasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathasnkmu|goshadathasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathasmu|gokishadathasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadathassher|shadathassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadathasnksher|goshadathasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadathassher|gokishadathassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadathasng|shadathasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadathasnkng|goshadathasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadathasng|gokishadathasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadathasya|shadathasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadathasnkya|goshadathasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadathasya|gokishadathasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadathasyam|shadathasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadathasnkyam|goshadathasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadathasyam|gokishadathasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadathasnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shadathasnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadathasnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshadathasnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadathasnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishadathasnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathasnﾃｼro|shadathasnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathasnknﾃｼro|goshadathasnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathasnﾃｼro|gokishadathasnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathasnﾃｼmu|shadathasnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathasnknﾃｼmu|goshadathasnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathasnﾃｼmu|gokishadathasnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadathasshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shadathasshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadathasnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshadathasnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathasshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishadathasshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathasshﾃｫro|shadathasshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathasnkshﾃｫro|goshadathasnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathasshﾃｫro|gokishadathasshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathasshﾃｫmu|shadathasshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathasnkshﾃｫmu|goshadathasnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathasshﾃｫmu|gokishadathasshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadathasronﾃｼ|shadathasronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadathasnkronﾃｼ|goshadathasnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathasronﾃｼ|gokishadathasronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadathasroshﾃｫ|shadathasroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadathasnkroshﾃｫ|goshadathasnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadathasroshﾃｫ|gokishadathasroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadathasromu|shadathasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadathasnkromu|goshadathasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadathasromu|gokishadathasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadathasmunﾃｼ|shadathasmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadathasnkmunﾃｼ|goshadathasnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadathasmunﾃｼ|gokishadathasmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadathasmushﾃｫ|shadathasmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadathasnkmushﾃｫ|goshadathasnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadathasmushﾃｫ|gokishadathasmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadathasmuro|shadathasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadathasnkmuro|goshadathasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadathasmuro|gokishadathasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
